name: Aeroplan® Credit Card
title: Aeroplan® Credit Card (Chase)
text:
Card: Aeroplan® Credit Card (Chase)
Pros: 
Cons: 
Annual fee: $95
Recommended credit: 670-850
Rewards: 1 - 3X points
Intro bonus: Earn 60,000 bonus points after you spend $3,000 on purchases in the first 3 months your account is open.
Points valuation: 1.4
APR: 19.74% - 28.24% Variable,19.74% - 28.24% Variable,28.49% Variable,Up to 29.99%
Benefits: New cardmembers will automatically receive Aeroplan 25K Status for the remainder of the calendar year, plus the following calendar year. Earn an Elite Status Level Up of one tier to 35K Status or higher for existing status holders with $50,000 in account spend during a calendar year. Primary cardmembers and travel companions (up to eight) traveling on the same reservation will each enjoy free first checked bags (up to 50lb) when travel originates on an Air Canada flight. Receive a statement credit of up to $100 every 4 years as a reimbursement for the application fee charged to your Aeroplan Card. Get one-year complimentary DashPass, a membership for both DoorDash and Caviar that provides unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fees and lower service fees on eligible orders. You can be reimbursed up to $1,500 per person and $6,000 per trip for your pre-paid, non-refundable passenger fares if your trip is canceled or cut short by sickness, severe weather, and other covered situations. Reimburses you for essential purchases like toiletries and clothing for baggage delays over 6 hours by passenger carrier. If your common carrier travel is delayed more than 12 hours or requires an overnight stay, you and your family are covered for unreimbursed expenses, such as meals and lodging. Decline the rental company's collision insurance and charge the entire rental cost to your card. Coverage is provided for theft and collision damage for most cars in the U.S. and abroad. Covers your new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft.
Transfer partners: This card earns Chase points
